name: Skordalia
recipeInstructions:
1. Note-- Lemon juice may be substituted for part of the white vinegar. Peel potatoes, boil until tender, then mash.
2. In a blender or food processor, process the garlic with about 1 tablespoon of olive oil until almost paste-like.
3. Transfer the garlic mixture to an electric mixer bowl.
4. Gradually add mashed potatoes, beating until the mixture resembles a paste.
5. Slowly incorporate the remaining olive oil and vinegar/lemon juice, beating thoroughly until well combined.
6. Add salt, taste for seasoning, and beat until the sauce is very thick and smooth. If needed, add more vinegar.
7. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Note-- Lemon juice may be substituted for part of the white vinegar.
